'''T-4''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] orbiting the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thaere Privo]] in the [[Thaereian system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="Memories" />

==Behind the scenes==
First appearing in the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force]] adventure, ''[[Looking In: Memories|Memories]]'', T-4 is identified and described as a moon orbiting Thaere Privo.<ref name="Memories" /> However, the adventure's supplemental web article, ''[[Trade and Trade Alike]]'', identifies T-4 in a sidebar as, "the rather uncreatively named fourth world of the Thaereian system."<ref name="TaTA">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/swlf20021031trade|text=Trade and Trade Alike}}</ref>
